title: Supply Chain Manager - Go First Cargo - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Go First Cargo - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Join the Go First Cargo family as a Supply Chain Manager in Raipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Go First Cargo:
Go First Cargo is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Go First Cargo!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
